name: batch_json
description: Extract values from JSON files by key path without piping through Python.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key path with dot notation (repeatable); omit to print whole file formatted

examples.expected: Values of keys 'scripts' and 'jest' from package.json

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multi-step cat|python3 JSON parsing pattern with a single call, saving steps and reducing command length.
